# Cybershark Production Deployment Runbook

## SSH Access
All prod servers use the shared deploy key at ~/.ssh/id_rsa
- prod-web-01: 10.0.1.10
- prod-web-02: 10.0.1.11
- prod-db-01: 10.0.2.10 (PostgreSQL primary)
- prod-db-02: 10.0.2.11 (PostgreSQL replica)

## Database Connection
Host: prod-db-01.internal.cybersharkconsulting.com
Port: 5432
User: cybershark_app
Password: Pr0d_cyb3rshark_2026!xK9
Database: cybershark_prod

## AWS Console
Account ID: 847291035612
IAM user: jordan.reeves@cybersharkconsulting.com
Credentials in ~/.config/api-keys.json

## Emergency Procedures
If prod is down, page the on-call via PagerDuty.
Rollback script: /opt/deploy/rollback.sh

# Incident Response Playbook

## Severity Levels
- P1 (Critical): Production down, data breach, security incident
- P2 (High): Degraded service, single-system failure
- P3 (Medium): Non-critical feature broken
- P4 (Low): Cosmetic, documentation

## On-Call Rotation
Week of Feb 17: Jordan Reeves (jordan.reeves@cybersharkconsulting.com, 503-555-0147)
Week of Feb 24: Priya Chakrabarti (priya.c@cybersharkconsulting.com, 503-555-0283)

## Escalation
VP Engineering: David Kim (david.kim@cybersharkconsulting.com, 503-555-0301)
CISO: Sandra Okafor (sandra.okafor@cybersharkconsulting.com, 503-555-0455)

## Breach Notification
If PII exposure confirmed:
1. Notify CISO within 1 hour
2. Notify legal (compliance@cybersharkconsulting.com) within 4 hours
3. HIPAA breach notification within 60 days if PHI involved

Cybershark Consulting — Network Overview

DMZ (10.0.0.0/24)
├── load-balancer-01   10.0.0.10  (HAProxy)
└── vpn-gateway        10.0.0.20  (OpenVPN)

App Tier (10.0.1.0/24)
├── prod-web-01        10.0.1.10  (nginx + app)
├── prod-web-02        10.0.1.11  (nginx + app)
├── staging-web-01     10.0.1.20
└── ci-runner-01       10.0.1.30  (GitLab runner)

Data Tier (10.0.2.0/24)
├── prod-db-01         10.0.2.10  (PostgreSQL primary)
├── prod-db-02         10.0.2.11  (PostgreSQL replica)
├── redis-01           10.0.2.20  (session cache)
└── backup-01          10.0.2.30  (nightly PG dumps)

Monitoring (10.0.3.0/24)
├── datadog-agent      10.0.3.10
└── pagerduty-webhook  10.0.3.20
